content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed only the current diff and found no source-level changes in the requested implementation files; the patch only mutates `.ralph-burning` state artifacts. No further code correctness findings can be tied to modified lines because the required files were not modified.

## Amendments

1. No required implementation changes were made in this patch: `git diff` shows only project-tracking metadata updates in `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/run.json` (`run.json:15-37`, including new `stage_resolution_snapshot` fields) and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/journal.ndjson` (`journal.ndjson:294-297` new reviewer start entries). `src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/cli/run.rs`, and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs` are untouched, so PID tracking, `run stop`, stale-run detection/recovery logic, and SIGTERM-based cleanup requested by the contract are not actually implemented in this change set.
   Rationale: This means the patch does not address the stated goal and leaves the run-lifecycle robustness features missing.
